calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jan-13-2021 Off Calendar

PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jan-08-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Epstein appeared by zoom for Tyler Smith (Petitioner).

The Court questions why it didn't get a petition in March of 2012, or before. Mr. Epstein stated that it was before he represented his Client, that his guess is that his Client was still a minor and that he thinks the thought process was not to do anything until his Client became of age without having to have a Guardian. Mr. Epstein also stated that the property was in the trust and the only asset, that Tyler is the only heir of Lisa and that when the property was transferred in 2012, the interest was put in the name of the Decedent. Mr. Epstein also confirmed that Lisa got a 12.5% interest in the property from Gladys, that it is his understanding that Gladys only owned a 50% interest in the building and that the other 50% percent was owned by another family member. In addition, Mr. Epstein stated that this is a non-tenant property, that they were living there, that there was no income, that this was the only asset of the trust and that he does not know if there was a will for Gladys. Furthermore, Mr. Epstein stated that he is trying to save his Client some money and avoid probate, that there are no other heirs and that there are no creditors. The Court pointed out that creditors would not have known that Lisa had an interest in the property. Mr. Epstein stated that Lisa's name has been on title since 2012. The Court stated that Lisa died in 2009, that there was a three-year period where creditors would not have known, that Probate Code 13151 is an exception to avoid probate, but the general rule is that the exception needs to be narrowly construed, that the real property was gift deeded to a deceased individual in 2012 and that there were three years where creditors were shut out because it wasn't public. Mr. Epstein stated that is seems the definition of real property includes a lease hold interest and that Lisa had a vested interest in the real property by definition of the trust. The Petition to Determine Succession to Real Property is under submission. The Court noted that Mr. Epstein has filed a petition for probate with a hearing date of January 13, 2021 and stated that if this petition gets granted, that hearing date will be vacated.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Dec-15-2020 Continued To Jan-05-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
